allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Clean index.html: strip Wayback boilerplate, fix URLs to relative paths

- Remove all Wayback Machine injected scripts, stylesheets, and toolbar HTML
- Remove trailing Wayback archive/playback timing comments
- Convert all Wayback-rewritten asset URLs to relative paths \(images/, midi/\)
- Convert all Wayback-rewritten internal links to relative .html paths
- Strip Wayback wrapper from mailto: links
- Restore bare external friend links to original URLs
- Add placeholder alt text for unrecovered images \(emove1.gif, ie4get_animated.gif\)
- bgsound src points to midi/mana.mid \(file not yet recovered\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-sonnet-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Clean all remaining pages: strip Wayback boilerplate, fix URLs

Applied consistently to name.html, creatures.html, foods.html, places.html,
location.html, topten.html, outcasts.html, poll.html, happytrees.html,
portal.html, tools.html:

- Remove Wayback injected scripts, stylesheets, and toolbar HTML blocks
- Remove Tripod popup ad JavaScript \(injected by Tripod host, not original\)
- Remove trailing FILE ARCHIVED / playback timings comments
- Convert all Wayback-rewritten asset URLs to relative paths \(images/, midi/\)
- Convert all internal page links from absolute Wayback URLs to relative .html paths
- Unwrap mailto: links from Wayback wrappers
- Restore homepage button links to index.html

Missing images noted with placeholder alt text per page:
- name.html: homepage.gif, midi/sombansh.mid \(bgsound\)
- creatures.html: wookiepoodle.gif, ruffle.jpg, homepage.gif, midi/creaturemusic.mid
- foods.html: mouse.gif \(Raemer Puff\), homepage.gif, midi/food.mid
- places.html: homepage.gif, midi/pureland.mid, backrounds/pearl.jpg
- location.html: n604.jpg \(galaxy map\), uranus.jpg \(planetary montage\), homepage.gif, midi/manafort.mid, backrounds/flashstars.gif
- topten.html: music.gif; midi links #1-#9 except magnetremix.mid not recovered
- outcasts.html: poochyfry.jpg, homepage.gif, midi/castle.mid
- poll.html: rufflecrumb.jpg \(poll thumbnail\), homepage.gif, midi/somend.mid; voting service \(vantagenet.com\) defunct - noted in HTML comment
- happytrees.html: lightl.gif, homepage.gif, midi/manatitle1.mid
- portal.html: porthole.gif, homepage.gif, midi/pureland.mid
- tools.html: tools.gif, homepage.gif, midi/sombest.mid

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-sonnet-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
